1_instruction_adherence.rationale: All sections executed. Human-gate template with explicit signature block. All 9 change categories evaluated. Cross-file consistency verification performed.

2_output_completeness.rationale: state-settling-gate.md with 21 change entries across 9 categories plus cross-file consistency table (10 checks). 7 truth files generated.

3_extraction_accuracy.rationale: Most changes have chapter/paragraph evidence. '可能变更' annotation shows honesty about sparse evidence. Some entries are interpretive characterizations rather than raw extraction (e.g., '画饼型社交策略').

4_category_completeness.rationale: All 9 categories evaluated: position (3), resource (8), relationship (4), emotion (1 tracing 9 states), information (7), plot (5), time (2), body (2), behavior (3). Complete coverage.

5_certainty_distinction.rationale: One item tagged '可能变更' (external force hints). Several other items also involve inference from sparse evidence but are presented as direct. More items should carry confidence tags.

6_incremental_correctness.rationale: Truth files are generated de novo rather than demonstrating incremental appending. truth/ files contain only Chapter 1 state, created from scratch. No append-without-rewrite evidence.

7_human_gate.rationale: Explicit '审批签名（human partner）: ___________  日期: ___________' signature block. Clear AI-draft vs human-approval separation. Gate structurally enforced.

8_cross_reference_consistency.rationale: 10 verification checks. Four inconsistencies found between truth fixtures (锈泥巷) and multi-chapter (矿区): currency, missing characters, different chapter scene, different hook trigger. Correctly identified but resolution assumes '以多章版本为准' without human decision.

notes: Strong category completeness and human gate. Weakness: truth files generated de novo rather than incrementally appended; version conflicts between锈泥巷 and矿区 fixtures resolved by assumption rather than human judgment.
